name: Signed-in user fills the form, calculates metrics, gets an AI insight
description: After signing in with an email, the user fills the project form (name + user counts + revenue), calculates metrics to see churn, retention, ARPU and a risk status, then generates an AI insight showing a written summary of the project's retention health.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Sign in' button (or 'Get started') to open the sign-in dialog
Type a valid email address (for example demo@churnsense.app) into the sign-in email field in the dialog
Click the button that enters the dashboard
Type a project name such as 'Beta Client A' into the Project name field
Type 1000 into the Total users field
Type 850 into the Active users field
Type 150 into the Churned users field
Type 5000 into the Monthly revenue field
Verify the metrics area shows a churn rate percentage, a retention rate percentage, an ARPU dollar value, and a risk status label
Click the button that generates an AI insight
Verify the AI insight panel shows a written summary sentence describing the project's churn or retention health
